visual: Feet wider than shoulders with toes parallel, knees bent deeply as if astride a horse, back straight and arms often held out in front.
motion_description: The person shifts weight to the right leg and steps the left foot out to a wide position, planting both feet. As the body slowly lowers into a deep squat, both arms rise outward to the sides up to shoulder height, then curve forward to form a circular shape at chest level with palms facing inward. The torso remains straight and forward-facing throughout this continuous, deliberate flow.
